title: Adding Project Teams to Monday Products (not just Work Management)
excerpt: I manage a portfolio of projects utilizing the Monday Projects product. I would love to be able to add teams to project workspaces within the Projects product and set them as owners, rather than having to individually ad…

posts.author: SBlomfield (Sarah Blomfield)
posts.cookedHtml: I manage a portfolio of projects utilizing the Monday Projects product. I would love to be able to add teams to project workspaces within the Projects product and set them as owners, rather than having to individually add team members to the workspace and then add the teams to each board within the workspace. The new feature rolled out recently within Work Management resolved this issue for that product, but it would be nice to have it available elsewhere, as we don’t use WM.
